title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARACALES, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO PARACELIS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 226 / 65 OG No. 2, 243 (January 13, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4738, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARACALES, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, TO PARACELIS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Paracales, Mountain Province, is hereby changed to Paracelis.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
